Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-server/contents/docs/api" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" 2>/dev/null || echo "failed")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-server/contents/docs/api/ref" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" 2>/dev/null || echo "failed")

Bash(curl -s "https://search.openfoodfacts.org/openapi.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m.upper\(\), p\) for p,ms in d['paths'].items\(\) for m in ms if m in ['get','post']]" 2>/dev/null | head -30)

Bash(curl -s "https://search.openfoodfacts.org/openapi.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Print search GET params
print\('=== GET /search ==='\)
for p in d['paths']['/search']['get'].get\('parameters', []\):
    print\(f\\"  {p.get\('name'\)} \({p.get\('in'\)}\): {p.get\('description',''\)[:80]}\\"\)

print\(\)
print\('=== GET /autocomplete ==='\)
for p in d['paths']['/autocomplete']['get'].get\('parameters', []\):
    print\(f\\"  {p.get\('name'\)} \({p.get\('in'\)}\): {p.get\('description',''\)[:80]}\\"\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://search.openfoodfacts.org/openapi.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)

# Print search GET response schema
print\('=== GET /search response 200 ==='\)
resp = d['paths']['/search']['get']['responses']['200']
schema = resp.get\('content', {}\).get\('application/json', {}\).get\('schema', {}\)
print\(json.dumps\(schema, indent=2\)[:3000]\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://search.openfoodfacts.org/openapi.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
schemas = d['components']['schemas']

# Print SuccessSearchResponse
print\('=== SuccessSearchResponse ==='\)
print\(json.dumps\(schemas['SuccessSearchResponse'], indent=2\)[:2000]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== autocomplete response ==='\)
resp = d['paths']['/autocomplete']['get']['responses']['200']
schema = resp.get\('content', {}\).get\('application/json', {}\).get\('schema', {}\)
print\(json.dumps\(schema, indent=2\)[:2000]\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://search.openfoodfacts.org/openapi.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)

# Check autocomplete response details
print\('=== Full autocomplete endpoint ==='\)
print\(json.dumps\(d['paths']['/autocomplete'], indent=2\)[:3000]\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://search.openfoodfacts.org/search?q=banana&page_size=1&fields=code,product_name,brands,serving_size,serving_quantity,image_url,nutriments&page=1" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('count:', d['count']\)
print\('hits structure:'\)
if d['hits']:
    print\(json.dumps\(d['hits'][0], indent=2\)\)
")
